title: Understanding Multiplication Through Objects

sentences.text: Look at these colorful objects grouped together on the screen.
Can you guess how we might count them quickly with groups?
Now, let's create an array using these objects arranged in rows.
This array helps us see multiplication as repeated addition.
Count these groups together, how many objects do you see?
Try to write down the multiplication fact for this array.
Great job today understanding multiplication with groups and arrays!
Remember, multiplication is just repeated addition with objects.

teacherNotes: Focus on encouraging students to see multiplication as groups of objects.
